name: Western Digital Corporation
description: Western Digital Corporation is a prominent American technology company specializing in data storage solutions. Headquartered in San Jose, California, the company is one of the world's largest manufacturers of hard disk drives and solid-state drives. Founded in 1970, Western Digital provides a comprehensive portfolio of products, including storage devices, systems, and platforms that enable individuals and organizations to capture, preserve, access, and transform data. Through its well-known brands, the company serves a diverse range of markets, from consumer electronics to enterprise-level data centers, playing a critical role in the global digital infrastructure.
